# gradle-catalog

> A Gradle Version Catalog providing centralized dependency and plugin
> version management for Java/Kotlin JVM projects. Published as
> `com.rubensgomes:gradle-catalog` to GitHub Packages.

This repository contains no application source code — the single
deliverable is `gradle/libs.versions.toml`.

## Docs

- [README.md](README.md): User-facing setup, consumer configuration
  (including required GitHub Packages auth), local development, and
  release commands.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Agent-facing conventions and guardrails for
  working in this repo.

## Source

- [gradle/libs.versions.toml](gradle/libs.versions.toml): The catalog —
  `[versions]`, `[libraries]`, `[bundles]`, `[plugins]`.
- [build.gradle.kts](build.gradle.kts): Publishing and release plugin wiring.
- [gradle.properties](gradle.properties): Maven coordinates, POM metadata,
  Gradle runtime flags.
- [settings.gradle.kts](settings.gradle.kts): Plugin management.
- [.github/workflows/release.yml](.github/workflows/release.yml): CI
  release workflow (push to `main` → tag → publish).

## Optional

- [Published packages](https://github.com/rubensgomes/jvm-libs/packages/2811984):
  Browse released versions of this catalog.
- [Gradle version catalogs userguide](https://docs.gradle.org/current/userguide/platforms.html):
  Upstream Gradle documentation on version catalogs.
